task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Lead Router** (Level 7)

Build a lead routing API. Prospects submit leads (name, email, company, size). The server applies routing rules: SMB → alice, Mid-market → bob, Enterprise → charlie — set assigned_to automatically before saving. Need: POST /api/leads (submit + auto-route), GET /api/leads (list), GET /api/leads/new (only status='new').

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  s
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

owner is 'admin@acme.com'
allow signup and login

/*
DATAFLOW:
┌──────────┐    POST /api/leads    ┌──────────┐    save    ┌────────┐
│ Frontend │ ─────────────────────> │ Backend  │ ────────> │   DB   │
│  (form)  │ <───────────────────── │ (server) │ <──────── │(memory)│
└──────────┘    GET /api/leads      └──────────┘   query   └────────┘
*/

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  company
  size, default 'SMB'
  assigned_to
  status, default 'new'

when user calls POST /api/leads sending data:
  validate data:
    name must not be empty
    email must not be empty
  assigned = 'alice'
  if data's size is 'Enterprise':
    assigned = 'charlie'
  if data's size is 'Mid-market':
    assigned = 'bob'
  data's assigned_to = assigned
  data's status = 'new'
  saved = save data to Leads
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/leads:
  leads = get all Leads
  send back leads

when user calls GET /api/leads/new:
  leads = get all Leads where status is 'new'
  send back leads

page 'App' at '/':
  heading 'Lead Router'
  section 'Submit New Lead':
    name = ''
    email = ''
    company = ''
    size = 'SMB'
    'Name' is a text input saved as name
    'Email' is a text input saved as email
    'Company' is a text input saved as company
    'Company Size' is a dropdown with ['SMB', 'Mid-market', 'Enterprise'] saved as size
    button 'Submit Lead':
      send { name, email, company, size } as a new record to '/api/leads'
  section 'All Leads':
    on page load get leads from '/api/leads'
    display leads as table

test 'POST /api/leads with Enterprise size':
  call POST /api/leads sending { name is 'Alice Smith', email is 'a@acmecorp.com', size is 'Enterprise' }
  expect response status is 201

test 'POST /api/leads with SMB size':
  call POST /api/leads sending { name is 'Bob Jones', email is 'b@tinyco.com', size is 'SMB' }
  expect response status is 201

test 'GET /api/leads returns list':
  call GET /api/leads
  expect response status is 200

test 'POST /api/leads with empty body returns 400':
  call POST /api/leads sending {}
  expect response status is 400
